actions.intent: Start the lower buried route first, rejecting the tempting high puppy while the water-near target still has recovery margin.
Keep committing to the lower rescue lane and clear the blocker pressure around the urgent puppy.
Finish the lower puppy's route before spending actions on the visually easier top target.
Stabilize the dock with a triple clear before the final high-target rescue move.

notes: Designer-approved lower-first recovery path for the false-easy target choice.
